hero.description: I architect and build scalable, secure, and exceptional digital experiences. Let's turn complex requirements into elegant solutions.

services.title: What I Do
services.s1Desc: Building complete, end-to-end web applications with modern architectures tailored to your business needs.
services.s2Desc: Designing secure, high-performance RESTful APIs and microservices handling complex business logic.
services.s3Desc: Optimizing relational and NoSQL databases for scalability, performance, and data integrity.

project1.title: E-Commerce Platform
project1.desc: A fully functional modern e-commerce platform with real-time inventory and seamless checkout.

project2.title: School Management System
project2.desc: A comprehensive dashboard for managing student grades, attendance, and administrative tasks.

project3.title: AI Content Generator App
project3.desc: An advanced SaaS application utilizing React and OpenAI APIs for automated content generation.

project4.title: CRM Dashboard (Laravel)
project4.desc: A robust customer relationship management system built with PHP Laravel and MySQL.

project5.title: Finance API (Spring Boot)
project5.desc: A secure, high-performance financial API microservice utilizing Java Spring Boot and PostgreSQL.

project6.title: Task Collab (Angular & Node)
project6.desc: A real-time project management tool using Angular, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
